case_title: LANCE CRUCET VS. MICHAEL JOSEPH SULLIVAN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRUCET, LANCE
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)
ARBITRATOR TERRY MICHAEL GORDON APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION NOV-14-2003 THROUGH FEB-12-2004.

DEFENDANT MICHAEL SULLIVAN'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF IMPOSITION OF MONETARY SANCTIONS ISSUED ON 4/15/2004 TO LOUIS RAYMOND BARELLA, ESQ., AND LOREN NIZINSKI, ESQ., IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 EACH IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. JOINDER OF PLAINTIFF IN DEFENDANT'S MOTION IS ALSO SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE OR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION AND JOINDER IS ADOPTED. MOTIONS ARE ORDERED GRANTED. SANCTIONS AS TO PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL ARE ORDERED VACATED. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: VALERIE PAPALE (212)

calendar.matters:
Mtn For Reconsideration Of Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-27-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Michael Sullivan's Motion for Reconsideration of Imposition of Monetary Sanctions issued on 4/15/2004 to Louis Raymond Barella, Esq., and Loren Nizinski, Esq., in the amount of $250.00 each is scheduled this day. Joinder of Plaintiff in Defendant's motion is also scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant Motion and Joinder is adopted. Motions are ordered granted. Sanctions as to Plaintiff's and Defendant's counsel are ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings reported by: Valerie Papale (212)
